chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-6457 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of CMA. No. 28855/2024 2. For hearing of main case. 22-01-2025. Rana Sakhawat Ali Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Siddiq Advocate holds brief for Sardar Zafar Hussain Advocate for the Respondent No.2 Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceedings initiated by the respondent Department, during the pendency of the appeal before the Custom Appellate Tribunal, Karachi. The respective learned counsel jointly state that it may be just and proper to dispose of this petition with directions for expeditious conclusion of the appeal, while restraining the recovery of the impugned demand in the interim period. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of by directing the Custom Appellate Tribunal, Karachi, to decide the pending Appeal expeditiously; preferably within 60 days from the date hereof. However, the respondents shall not take any coercive action against the petitioner, in respect of the impugned demand, till the conclusion of the Appeal. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application(s). Judge Judge Nasir
